title: xyris nigra
intro: Xyris nigra is a type of flowering plant, also known as the black-eyed grass, that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Xyris nigra include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Xyris nigra is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots can also be used to make herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
